meaning: n.撒拉逊人,阿拉伯人的古称
examples: That witness, if you call him that, is a Saracen .
Older fans love Chewbacca for his heroism, said Kathleen Saracen, the manager of Titan Games and Comics in Smyrna, Georgia.
"We have a sold out match and we are fairly confident that the overwhelming majority of Saracens supporters will approve, " said Saracen's chief executive Edward Griffiths.
